headline: Modani Furniture, BH Group, and Lennar Unveil Partnership Program for Turnkey Luxury Living
summary: Modani, the leading modern luxury furniture brand operating 17 showrooms across the United States, announced a partnership program with national homebuilder Lennar and South Florida developer BH Group at the Greenview at Presidential luxury development. The project marks Aventura's first new premier single-family estates enclave in more than 25 years, featuring private pools, luxury amenities, and close proximity to world-class shopping, dining, and entertainment destinations. headline: A Look At Lennar (LEN) Valuation After Backlog And Profitability Concerns Weigh On Sentiment
summary: Lennar (LEN) is back in focus after reports that its backlog and profitability metrics have deteriorated, with weaker new order intake, rising competition, and falling free cash flow margin weighing on investor sentiment. See our latest analysis for Lennar. Those concerns sit against a tougher backdrop for the stock, with the share price down 23.72% over the past 90 days and 14.77% year to date, while the 1 year total shareholder return is 14.07% lower. This suggests momentum has faded...
